mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USER_ACCOUNT WHERE ROLE = 1 AND NAME LIKE '%'||#{name}||'%' ORDER BY NO ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_ACCOUNT (NO, ID, PWD, PHONE, REG_DATE, ROLE, NAME) VALUES (SEQ_USER_ACCOUNT_NO.NEXTVAL, #{id}, #{pwd}, #{phone}, SYSDATE, 1, #{name})
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_ACCOUNT SET ID=#{id}, PWD=#{pwd}, PHONE=#{phone}, NAME=#{name} WHERE NO=#{no}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USER_ACCOUNT WHERE ROLE = 2 AND NAME LIKE '%'||#{id}||'%' ORDER BY NO ASC
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM USER_ACCOUNT WHERE NO IN
#{id}
